nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Bataan National Park
nodes.summary: Bataan National Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联23种鸟类，包括Rufous coucal、Scale-feathered malkoha、Philippine drongo-cuckoo等23种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park
nodes.summary: Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联29种鸟类，包括Rufous coucal、Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Philippine hawk-cuckoo等29种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: White-lored oriole
nodes.summary: White-lored oriole（White-lored oriole，学名 Oriolus albiloris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas such as Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park and Bataan National Park but despite this legal protection, enforcement is lax and these areas continue to be deforested

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas such as Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park and Bataan National Park but despite this legal protection, enforcement is lax and these areas continue to be deforested

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Its threats are mainly habitat loss due to deforestation for lumber, mining and farmlands

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Its threats are mainly habitat loss due to deforestation for lumber, mining and farmlands
